t_ch: 你和三月七打断了冒牌货的叫卖。
t_en: You and March 7th interrupt the fraud's hawking.

t_ch: 怎么又是你们这帮东西…现在我看到垃圾桶就烦，这个世界真的需要这么多垃圾桶吗？
t_en: It's you lot again... I get all inexplicably irate when I see trashcans now. Does the world really need so many trashcans?

t_ch: 唉…我们是怀揣演艺梦想的「出道的桶」，为了追逐登场机会，最终误入歧途。今天落到你们手里，也算死得其所……
t_en: *sigh* ...We are the Debut Trashcans bearing with us dreams of showbiz. To pursue this chance of debuting, we eventually wound up on the wrong path. Now that we have ended up in your clutches, it's at least a fitting end...

t_ch: 哼哼，明白就好。
t_en: Hmph, as long as you get it.

t_ch: 代言费，打钱！
t_en: Our endorsement fee, cough it up!

t_ch: 收藏品，上交！
t_en: Collectibles, give 'em!

t_ch: 我们一定照办…各位还有什么要求吗？
t_en: We will do as we're told... Do you have any other requests?

t_ch: 来当<color=#dbc291ff>义务模特</color>吧。
t_en: Come and <color=#dbc291ff>volunteer to be a model</color>

t_ch: 什么？你们还愿意相信我们的演技？眼前怎么模糊了…莫非是下雨了？不…原来，是热泪打湿了眼眶…我们一定尽力而为！
t_en: What? You'd still believe in our acting? Why are my eyes blurring up... Is it raining? No... It's the hot tears flooding my eyes... We will definitely do our best!

t_ch: 好浮夸的演技！
t_en: Overacting much!

t_ch: 从我的取景框里<color=#dbc291ff>滚出去</color>！
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Get out</color> of my viewfinder!

t_ch: 「星穷列车」诚惶诚恐地深深欠身，忙不迭离开了场地。
t_en: The Arstral Express earnestly expresses their deepest apologies, then scurries off the site in a jiffy.

t_ch: 呼，总算走了…已经不想再拍垃圾桶了！
t_en: Phew, that's them gotten rid of... I don't want to shoot trashcans ever again!

t_ch: 啊，拍得真好啊…我又回想起了决定成为演员的那天。那天，也像今天一样阳光明媚。谢谢你们，让我们回想起了如泪水般晶莹剔透的初心…暂且告辞！
t_en: Ah, very nice shots... I'm reminded of the day I decided to become an actor. Like today, it was a bright sunny day. Thank you all for reminding us of our aspirations, so clear as crystal tears... Farewell for now!

t_ch: 「星穷列车」深深欠身，随后离开了场地。
t_en: The Arstral Express expresses their deepest apologies and leaves the site.

t_ch: 呃…这张照片真的有这么打动人心吗？{NICKNAME}，给它起个名吧。
t_en: Err... Can this photo really invoke such strong emotions? {NICKNAME}, you should give it a name.

t_ch: 「逐梦生态圈」。
t_en: "Dreamchaser Circle."

t_ch: 有些圈子可不是想进就能进的。
t_en: It's not like anyone can just get a foot into these circles.

t_ch: 「星穷列车」。
t_en: "Arstral Express."

t_ch: 竟然连我们都有人冒充…看来是时候注册个商标了！
t_en: I can't believe even WE have someone impersonating us... It seems it's time to register a trademark!

t_ch: 「匹诺康尼不相信眼泪」。
t_en: "Penacony Does Not Believe in Tears."

t_ch: 建议他们还是沉淀一阵子，磨练磨练演技再复出吧！
t_en: They should probably get more experience and shape up their acting before re-debuting!

t_ch: 上传照片，今天的拍摄就结束啦。不知道芮克先生和观众们会怎么评价呢？
t_en: Photos uploaded, and that's the end of today's shoot. I wonder what Mr. Reca and the viewers will say?

t_ch: 拍得不错！我刚刚偷瞄了眼标价…咱们还是快些给照片起个名，离它远一些吧。
t_en: Not bad! I sneaked a peek at the price... We'd better name the photo and keep our distance from it.

t_ch: 要是磕着漆面，我们估计得在匹诺康尼洗一个琥珀纪的盘子。
t_en: If we scratch its paint, I reckon we'd be washing dishes on Penacony for at least an Amber Era.

t_ch: 叫「斯车若彩虹」吧。
t_en: How about "This Car's Like a Rainbow"?

t_ch: 叫「无名客的钟爱」吧。
t_en: How about "Nameless' Beloved"?

t_ch: 叫「列车组喜提豪车」吧。
t_en: How about "Express Limousine"?

t_ch: 上传照片，今天的拍摄就结束啦。不知道芮克先生和观众们会怎么评价呢？
t_en: Photos uploaded, and that's the end of today's shoot. I wonder what Mr. Reca and the viewers will say?

t_ch: 第一天的课题竟然是「品牌聚焦」，要求与苏乐达有关…怎么看都是赞助商打广告吧？
t_en: The first day's task is actually "Brand Focus" and they want it to be about SoulGlad... It's all just sponsored commercials, isn't it?

t_ch: 记得这边有个苏乐达喷泉，就拍它试试吧。
t_en: I remember there was a SoulGlad fountain here. Let's try taking some shots of it.

t_ch: （好大的睡蕉小猴…走近些看看吧。）
t_en: (What a huge Slumbernana Monkey... let's get closer and take a look.)

t_ch: 就在前边的沙发上！
t_en: On the sofa, up ahead!

t_ch: 去它正面拍一张试试吧……
t_en: Take a photo of its front...

t_ch: 这边的门进去就是了。
t_en: It's through this door.

t_ch: 看起来还不错呢——巨大的玻璃瓶喷泉，展现了商业帝国不可一世的统治力！
t_en: Doesn't look too shabby. A giant glass bottle fountain that showcases the sheer dominance of a business empire!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，咱们给这张照片起个名吧。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, let's name this photo.
"Fountain."

t_ch: 「美梦速速达」。
t_en: "Speedy Sweet Dreams to Be Had with SoulGlad."

t_ch: 「猴子喝了都说好」。
t_en: "All the Monkeys Say It's Good."

t_ch: 呃…睡蕉小猴可不会说好，只会说「蕉」。
t_en: Err... The Slumbernana Monkey can't talk, and it can only say "nana."

t_ch: 按照流程，起完名就可以上传啦。不知道会收到什么样的评价…真紧张啊。
t_en: According to the process, we can upload it once we've named it. I wonder what comments we'll get... I'm so nervous.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，开了个好头呢。按照芮克先生的建议，接下来可以试试拍…睡蕉小猴？
t_en: Hee-hee, that's a good start. According to Mr. Reca's suggestion, next up we can try shooting... a Slumbernana Monkey?

t_ch: 睡蕉小猴…
t_en: Slumbernana Monkey...

t_ch: 为什么会出现在这里？
t_en: What's it doing here?

t_ch: 睡蕉小猴的「模因病毒」应该已经被清除了才对…难道还有漏网之鱼？
t_en: The Slumbernana Monkey memetic virus should have been removed... Was the cleansing not thorough enough?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，赶紧追上它！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, after it, quickly!

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Nanananana!

t_ch: 你和三月七一路紧追，终于在朝露公馆将它逼上绝路。
t_en: You and March 7th give chase, eventually cornering it at Dewlight Pavilion.

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Nanananana!

t_ch: 看你还往哪儿跑，束手就擒吧！{NICKNAME}，使用「全力擒拿」！
t_en: Let's see where you can run to now! Give it up! {NICKNAME}, use Mighty Grapple!

t_ch: 「全力擒拿」！
t_en: Mighty Grapple!

t_ch: 当我是以太灵吗？
t_en: You think I'm an Aether Spirit!?

t_ch: 哎呀，没时间掰扯这些细节了，总之快抓住它！
t_en: Argh, there's no time to bicker over such trivialities. Just catch it now!

t_ch: 「全力擒拿」！
t_en: Mighty Grapple!

t_ch: 前扑！
t_en: Lunge!

t_ch: 人类在漫长的进化中得到了智慧，也失去了很多。譬如「尾巴」，譬如「皮毛」，譬如「敏捷的身手」。
t_en: Humanity obtained intelligence through the long process of evolution, but they also lost much. Such as their tails, fur, and dexterous reflexes.

t_ch: 睡蕉小猴闪身躲过了你的袭击，你一头扑到沙盘上，眼前一阵天旋地转……
t_en: The Slumbernana Monkey dodges your attack, leaving you catching air and a mouth full of sand. Your eyes see nothing but stars...

t_ch: 人呢人呢！怎么一眨眼就不见了——
t_en: Where are you! I blinked and you're gone...

t_ch: 你聪明的头脑迅速判断了局势。很显然，和这古老物种对抗并非明智之举。
t_en: Your smart mind quickly assesses the situation. It's obvious that confronting the ancient monkey species was terribly unwise.

t_ch: 不过，拍张照还是可以的。
t_en: But it's alright to take a photo of it.

t_ch: 呼…刚才你一眨眼就不见了，真吓人。
t_en: Phew... You vanished into thin air for a second, and I was so scared.

t_ch: 找到了拍照的新角度？那我就不轻举妄动了。记得速战速决！
t_en: You found a new angle to take photos? I won't make any sudden moves then. Just remember to make it quick!

t_ch: 你们又费了一番功夫，终于抓住了睡蕉小猴……
t_en: You two tumble around for a long while before finally subduing the Slumbernana Monkey...

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Nanananana!

t_ch: 这只小猴的眼神怎么看起来格外智慧呢……
t_en: Why do this monkey's eyes look oddly intelligent...

t_ch: 摇一摇。
t_en: Jostle it.

t_ch: 拽一拽。
t_en: Kick it.

t_ch: 甩一甩。
t_en: Shake it.

t_ch: 原来只是玩具…睡蕉小猴流行时「助蕉」造了一大批小猴周边，大概这就是其中之一。
t_en: It's just a toy... The Assistanana made a whole batch of monkey merch during the Slumbernana Monkey craze. This one's probably from that time.

t_ch: 不过误打误撞，倒是拍出了不错的照片。{NICKNAME}，给它起个名吧。
t_en: But we got some great photos out of our accidental chaos. {NICKNAME}, give it a name.

t_ch: 「睡蕉大猴」。
t_en: "Slumbernana Ape."

t_ch: 睡蕉小猴当时要是都这么大，事情可就不好收场了…不过乱破小姐说恒星大小的猴子她也打得过。
t_en: If the Slumbernana Monkey was this big, we'd be in for a rough time... Though Miss Rappa did say that she could defeat a monkey the size of a star.

t_ch: 「美少女与金刚猴」。
t_en: "Beauty and the Golden Monkey."

t_ch: 像是克劳克影业动画片的名字…怎么也把本姑娘编排进去了？
t_en: Sounds like the title of a Clock Studios cartoon... Why'd you include me in the title though?

t_ch: 「进击的巨猴」。
t_en: "Attack on Giant Monkey."

t_ch: 呜哇，又回想起了被睡蕉小猴的潮流支配的恐惧……
t_en: Woah, I just recalled the horrific frenzy the Slumbernana Monkey craze created...

t_ch: 今天的两张照片都完成啦，拍照还真累啊…也辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: The two photos for today are all done. Photography is so tiring... Good work from you too, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 上传照片之后，看看大家的反响吧。
t_en: Let's see what everyone's comments are after uploading the photos.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你可算来了。今天的课题是怎么回事？「花火的绚丽写真」…呃，咱们真的要拍这个吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're finally here. What's going on with today's task? "Sparkle's Splendiferous Memoir"... Err, are we really going to shoot this?

t_ch: 又是花火的恶作剧吧？
t_en: Another one of Sparkle's pranks?

t_ch: 确实是她会做出来的事情呢。
t_en: Sure seems like she's capable of this.

t_ch: 看来花火当上赞助商了。
t_en: Looks like Sparkle's become a sponsor.

t_ch: 谐乐学院一定不会让假面愚者赞助的啦！
t_en: Charmony Academy definitely won't allow a Masked Fool to sponsor them!

t_ch: 不知道这家伙又想捣什么鬼。既然她留下了娃娃的提示，那我们就去找来拍拍看吧。
t_en: I wonder if she's up to something again. Since she left behind the doll as a clue, we'll just use that and take some photos.

t_ch: 话说回来，她到底在船上留下了多少个娃娃？{NICKNAME}，你该抽时间大扫除一下了。
t_en: Speaking of which, how many dolls did she even leave on the airship? {NICKNAME}, you should use some time to make a clean sweep of them.

t_ch: 你和三月七挖地三尺，终于找到了花火娃娃的踪迹……
t_en: You and March 7th look everywhere you can, eventually finding the trail of Sparkle Doll...

t_ch: 呃，{NICKNAME}，应该不是我的错觉吧？这娃娃、这娃娃怎么自己动了？！
t_en: Uhh, {NICKNAME}, I'm not seeing things, am I? T—The d—doll, it's moving by itself!?

t_ch: 总感觉阴森森的…我们还是赶紧开溜吧？
t_en: It feels super creepy... We'd better get outta here fast.

t_ch: 这就害怕了？
t_en: You scare that easily?

t_ch: 呜啊，什么东西在说话！！！
t_en: Wahhh!!! Something's talking!!!

t_ch: 怎么咋咋呼呼的。别害怕，是我，小粉毛。
t_en: Stop causing a scene. Don't worry. It's just me, Pink Hair.

t_ch: 就是因为是你才害怕！
t_en: I got scared because of you!

t_ch: 这下你总算愿意搭理我了~我在作品评论区的留言，你可是不理不睬呢。
t_en: At least you're not ignoring me now! You weren't responding to my comments on your photos.

t_ch: 好记仇啊…
t_en: So petty...

t_ch: 就因为这个？
t_en: All just 'cuz of that?

t_ch: 对于演员来说，还有比被观众忽视更让人恼火的吗？
t_en: Is there anything more irritating for an actor than being ignored by your audience?

t_ch: 这可怪不得咱…摄影展压根就没有回复的功能！
t_en: You can't blame us... The photography exhibition doesn't have a reply function!

t_ch: 原来是这样，那还真是错怪你了，小粉毛~
t_en: Ooh I see. My bad then, Pink Hair!

t_ch: 不过先别急着发火。我给你们准备了个小玩意儿，找找看吧~
t_en: But don't unleash your fury just yet. I've prepared something fun for you guys. You just have to find it!

t_ch: 你们按照花火的提示，从娃娃口袋里找到一枚镜头。
t_en: You follow Sparkle's hint and fish out a lens from the doll's pocket.

t_ch: 拍够了一板一眼、循规蹈矩的照片，总得换换新鲜的口味吧？用这「镜头万花筒」，就能轻松办到。
t_en: Bored with one-click-one-shot, doldrums photos? How about a refreshing change? You can do that easily with this Camereidoscope.

t_ch: 收下。
t_en: We'll take it.

t_ch: 还有其他的附赠品吗？
t_en: Any other freebies for us?

t_ch: 花火娃娃头一歪，任你们再怎么呼唤也没有回应。这位缺乏耐心的假面愚者，大概已经对即将来到的追问环节失去了兴趣。
t_en: Sparkle Doll tilts its head, oblivious to all your cries to summon her. This restless Masked Fool must have already lost interest in the ensuing questions.

t_ch: 糟糕，忘了让这家伙复原课题…看来只好就这样上传了。{NICKNAME}，照片填什么名字好？
t_en: Dang, I forgot all about letting this fool restore the task to its original theme... No choice but to upload our photo. {NICKNAME}, what will we name this?

t_ch: 「花火大人的绚丽写真」。
t_en: "Miss Sparkle's Splendiferous Memoir."

t_ch: 「演员的自我修养」。
t_en: "An Actor Prepares."

t_ch: 「娃娃花火不会受伤」。
t_en: "Sparkle Doll Takes No Wounds."

t_ch: 话说回来，「镜头万花筒」和普通镜头之间，到底有什么区别呢？
t_en: Hey, what's the difference between this Camereidoscope and a normal lens?

t_ch: 实践出真知…
t_en: We'll find out when we try it...

t_ch: 我们去房间里试试吧。
t_en: Let's do that back in the room.

t_ch: 试试就试试！
t_en: Couldn't hurt, I guess!

t_ch: 咱们拍什么，写字桌，入梦池，放映机，还是舷窗外边的景色？
t_en: What should we take? The desk, Dreampool, projector, or the scenery outside the window?

t_ch: 请在沙发上坐下吧…
t_en: Please sit down on the sofa...

t_ch: 三月七模特！
t_en: Model March 7th!

t_ch: 原来是打算拿我做实验吗！
t_en: You want to use me for an experiment!?

t_ch: 三月七坐了下来，惶恐地看着镜头，好像那是随时会发射子弹的枪筒。你仔细想了想，也并非没有这个可能。
t_en: March 7th sits down and anxiously looks at the lens, as if it were a gun barrel ready to spit bullets at any moment. After consider it carefully, you conclude that such a thing is a real possibility.

t_ch: 记、记得要拍得好看一些！假如拍出了<color=#dbc291ff>奇怪的照片</color>，本姑娘可要拿你是问！
t_en: R—Remember to capture the best of me! If I see any <color=#dbc291ff>weird pictures</color>, I'm going to hold you responsible!

t_ch: 诶！这真的是我吗？！这个镜头的作用，莫非是……
t_en: Hey! Is this really me? Could this lens be...

t_ch: 能看透本质…
t_en: It can see into the subject's essence...

t_ch: 我的本质怎么就是折纸小鸟了呢！
t_en: My true nature is an origami bird!?

t_ch: 能自带特效…
t_en: It's got built-in special effects...

t_ch: 这也太逼真了吧！简直毫无修图痕迹。
t_en: Gosh, this is so real! No traces of any edits at all.

t_ch: 能看透本质…
t_en: It can see into the subject's essence...

t_ch: 我的本质怎么就是猫糕了呢！
t_en: Why am I a cake cat!?

t_ch: 这个镜头很危险，还是不用为好。相信本姑娘的直觉！
t_en: This lens is super dangerous, so we better not use it. Trust my gut!

t_ch: 用它拍的最后一张照片，就叫做「百变美少女的多重身份」吧！你觉得呢，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: That last photo we took using it... We'll just call it "Maiden's Myriad Masks"! What do you think, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 「百变美少女的多重身份」。
t_en: "Maiden's Myriad Masks."

t_ch: 「传奇摄影师的狂想摄影」。
t_en: "Legendary Photographer's Rhapsody."

t_ch: 「奇诡镜头的惊魂变身法」。
t_en: "Bizarre Lens's Form of Fright."

t_ch: 花火篡改了咱俩的课题，大家看了我们的照片，一定很摸不着头脑……
t_en: Sparkle tampered with our task. Everyone will be scratching their heads when they see our photos...

t_ch: 我已经完全理解了，原来大家都喜欢奇怪的照片。明天我也要用这个镜头！
t_en: I totally get it now, though — everyone loves weird photos. I want to keep using this lens tomorrow!

t_ch: 今天的课题是「室内人像」…
t_en: Today's task is "indoor human portraits"...

t_ch: 我们的创作好评如潮！
t_en: Our photos are raking in the good reviews!

t_ch: 热砂会场拍摄的模仿秀「梦境变变变」，我这几周一直有追哦。
t_en: I've been catching the Dreamscape Shift impressions show, filmed at Scorchsand Hall, these few weeks.

t_ch: 上半场演出马上就要结束了，咱们赶紧去抓拍几张！
t_en: The first half is about to end. We have to take a few photos!

t_ch: 知更鸟！知更鸟！
t_en: Robin! Robin!

t_ch: 真是惟妙惟肖呢。
t_en: It's just like the real thing.

t_ch: 嗬嗬，有趣有趣……
t_en: Ho-ho, very interesting...
Hmph.

t_ch: 知更鸟正在录制节目中…原来这就是她工作时的状态。
t_en: Robin is recording a show right now... So this is what she's like in work mode.

t_ch: 知更鸟保持着专业的微笑。趁着摄影机移开的空挡，朝你们眨了眨眼。
t_en: Robin maintains a professional smile, and flashes a wink at you all when the cameras aren't on her.

t_ch: 为什么只有我们家知更鸟没有板凳坐？节目组排挤得太明目张胆了！
t_en: Why is our Robin the only one without a bench to sit on? The show crew is so brazenly snubbing her!

t_ch: 这回他没带侍从吗？这位苜蓿草家主真是艺高人胆大。
t_en: Did he not bring along attendants this time? This Alfalfa Head sure is brave.

t_ch: 「嚯嗬嗬嗬」，老奥帝被表演逗得直笑。
t_en: Ohohoho, Old Oti is tickled pink by the show.

t_ch: 你开始相信他是出于个人趣味才来担任评委的。
t_en: You're starting to believe that he is only here as a judge purely out of personal interest.

t_ch: 哈努兄弟不耐烦地挪了挪身子——你打扰到它看节目了。
t_en: Brother Hanu restlessly shifts his posture — you are interrupting his viewing of the show.

t_ch: 滴~答！
t_en: Tick-tock!

t_ch: 欢迎来到美梦小镇~
t_en: Welcome to Dreamville!

t_ch: 「梦境变变变」上半场演出结束了。场间休息时，「钟表小子」找到了你们。
t_en: The first half of Dreamscape Shift is over. During the intermission, Clockie comes up to you.

t_ch: 滴~答！粉色的朋友、灰色的朋友，多亏你们的支持，聪明勇敢的钟表小子终于把石头老板赶跑啦！
t_en: Tick-tock! Pink-haired friend, gray-haired friend, it's all thanks to your support that the smart and brave Clockie managed to repel Boss Stone!

t_ch: 不客气，滴~答！
t_en: You're welcome, tick-tock!

t_ch: 钟表小子为伙伴准备了谢礼，请收下吧~滴~答！
t_en: I have prepared a gift for you. Please accept it, tick-tock!

t_ch: 呼——这么一来，演出算是圆满结束了。我模仿得还不错吧？
t_en: Phew... with that, the show has come to a close. My impressions weren't bad, eh?

t_ch: 模仿居然还在继续！
t_en: You're still doing it!

t_ch: 额咳咳——哈哈，抱歉，我入戏太深了。多谢你们替我拍照，请收下这个吧！
t_en: Aaahem... Haha, sorry, I was too immersed. Thanks for taking my photo. Please accept this!

t_ch: 实不相瞒，我来匹诺康尼闯荡这么久，这还是第一次获得登台机会。看到这张照片，我的家人一定会认可我来匹诺康尼打拼的决定！
t_en: To be frank, I've been on Penacony so long, but this is the first time I've gotten a chance to be on stage. With this photo, my family will surely approve of my decision to strive for my dream on Penacony!

t_ch: 竟然这么重大的意义！{NICKNAME}，这张照片一定得起个好名字。
t_en: So it holds such deep sentiment! {NICKNAME}, you must give this photo a great name.

t_ch: 「超级大变」。
t_en: "Megabomb Change."

t_ch: 呃…我知道你不是那个意思，但这是不是有点太令人读不出口了……
t_en: Err... I know you mean that his performance was the bomb, but some might understand it the other way...

t_ch: 「远大前程」。
t_en: "Promising Future."
"Hmph."

t_ch: 未免太敷衍了吧！至少也得是「一声赞许的*哼*」！
t_en: So facetious! At least a name like "'Hmph' of Approval"!

t_ch: 下半场模仿秀马上开始，咱们就在这儿稍等一会儿吧。
t_en: The second half is about to begin. Let's just wait around here for a bit.

t_ch: 我想到了个好主意…
t_en: I've got a good idea...

t_ch: 等着瞧好戏吧。
t_en: Just wait for a great performance to unfold.

t_ch: 唔，神秘兮兮的，不知道又在谋划什么鬼主意…早点回来哦，待会儿还需要你来掌镜呢。
t_en: Mm, so secretive. I wonder what scheme you're plotting again... Come back early. I still need you to help with the camera later!

t_ch: 登记报名、沟通行程，你忙里忙外，终于打点好了一切……
t_en: Registration, communication itinerary... You've been busy all over, and finally get everything sorted out.

t_ch: 快，{NICKNAME}，模仿秀的下半场马上开始。再不过去，就只能站在最后排啦。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, hurry, the second half of the show is about to start. We'll be standing in the last row if we don't go now.

t_ch: 诶，那是，那是——美梦剧团？模仿得也太逼真了吧？
t_en: Hey, that's, that's... the Sweet Dreams Troupe? This impression show is getting too real!

t_ch: 趁它们没下场，快拍一张！
t_en: Quick, snap a shot while they're still on the stage!

t_ch: 久违的演出…人家的演技还没有生疏呢。
t_en: A long-awaited performance... Still got the chops for acting.

t_ch: 汪！有这么多人陪司令玩，真幸福哇！
t_en: Woof! So many people to play with Mr. Bigwig. I'm so happy!

t_ch: 简直毫无瑕疵……
t_en: Simply flawless...

t_ch: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，精彩，实在精彩！
t_en: Ohohoho, exciting, absolutely breathtaking!
Hmph.

t_ch: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！真是精彩极了。三位表演者的演技真是高超，竟然能把美梦剧团演绎得如此讨人喜欢！
t_en: Ohohoho! That was marvelous. The three actors' performances were stellar. What a feat to portray the Sweet Dreams Troupe that provokes such endearment!

t_ch: 是呀，这样优秀的演员，值得大家的掌声。
t_en: Yes, these excellent actors deserve the audience's applause.

t_ch: 发出一声赞叹的*哼*。
t_en: Hmphs in approval.

t_ch: 现在，请你们揭下伪装，让大家看看你们的真容吧！
t_en: Now, please shed your disguises and show everyone your true visages!

t_ch: 各位评委，各位观众…这就是我们的真实面貌。
t_en: Judges, audience members... This IS what we really look like.

t_ch: 汪！我可是货真价实的汽水狗狗哇！
t_en: Woof! I'm a genuine soda doggo!

t_ch: 嚯哈哈哈哈，有趣，实在太有趣了！看来我们的表演者实在太入戏了…让我们再次用掌声，感谢他们这场绝妙的演出！
t_en: Ohohohoho, simply marvelous! Looks like our performers were too immersed in their acting... Let us applaud them again, to thank them for such a splendid performance!

t_ch: 可是…人家本来就是美梦剧团哦？
t_en: But... we are the Sweet Dreams Troupe to begin with?

t_ch: 嘘…{NICKNAME}说，像这样搞点噱头，没准能让剧团吸引更多人的关注。
t_en: Shh... {NICKNAME} said that we have to do something gimmicky like this to generate hype, and maybe the theater will get more awareness.

t_ch: 汪！好多掌声…都是给我的吗？我是一只幸福到要爆炸的糖浆汽水捏！
t_en: Woof! Such thunderous applause... Is it all for me? I'm a syrupy soda about to burst with happiness!

t_ch: ……所以，你直接把「惊梦酒吧」的怪物们请到模仿秀来模仿自己？
t_en: ...So, you got all the monsters from the Dreamjolt Hostelry to play as themselves in an impressions show?

t_ch: 真是清奇的思路，不过的确也让我们抓拍到了气氛轰动的舞台！
t_en: That's one way to go about it. Then again, we definitely got some shots that captured the stage's vibe!

t_ch: 好啦，最后给照片起个名字吧~
t_en: Alright, last thing — name this photo!

t_ch: 「惊梦踢踏舞」。
t_en: "Dreamjolt Tap."

t_ch: 「美梦剧团复出秀」。
t_en: "Sweet Dreams Troupe Comeback Show."

t_ch: 「我演我自己」。
t_en: "Appearing as Myself."

t_ch: 上传之后，今天的课题就圆满完成啦。{NICKNAME}，今天也辛苦你了！
t_en: With that upload, today's task is done. Good job, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 哼哼，{NICKNAME}，我在附近踩了一圈点，终于发现了这里！
t_en: Heh-heh, {NICKNAME}, I walked around the surrounding premises, and finally found this place!

t_ch: 你怎么换衣服了？
t_en: Why have you changed your clothes?

t_ch: 好不容易来一趟，当然得入乡随俗。
t_en: It's not every day we get to visit. When on foreign grounds...

t_ch: 想起了不好的回忆…
t_en: Some bad memories are surfacing...

t_ch: 放心，这回有本姑娘压阵，没人能关得住咱们。
t_en: Don't worry. No one will be locking us up with me around.

t_ch: 看了昨天大伙的评论，我总算知道该怎么选材了。
t_en: After reading everyone's comments yesterday, I finally know how to pick the theme.

t_ch: 就拿今天的课题来说吧，你要拍「古都雅韵」，就不能只拍长乐天的黛瓦白墙，不能只拍金人巷的万家烟火，不能只拍流云渡的千帆竞发……
t_en: Take today's task for example: You have to photograph "Stately Antiquity," so you can't just shoot the dark-tiled white walls of the Exalting Sanctum, nor the billowing smoke of Aurum Alley, nor the numerous competitions going on at Cloudford...

t_ch: 大道理一套一套的。
t_en: You sure are waxing eloquence.

t_ch: 那到底应该拍什么？
t_en: Then what can we photograph?

t_ch: 哼哼，拍幽囚狱！大家感兴趣又接触不到的东西，才是最吸引人的，就像这儿。
t_en: Heh-heh, the Shackling Prison, of course! Everyone's most captivated by things they are curious about but can't reach — just like this place.

t_ch: 一把筝？
t_en: A guzheng?

t_ch: 一群岁阳？
t_en: A group of heliobi?

t_ch: 按我的观察，它们应该是在模仿仙舟先祖，开办吟诗咏歌的「雅集」。
t_en: If my observations aren't wrong, they should be doing impressions of the Xianzhou forefathers — a hosting of literati engaging in poetry and song.

t_ch: 这可是字面意义的「雅韵」，再切题不过了，当然得拍下来！
t_en: This is the literal definition of "stately." It fits the theme perfectly, so of course we have to snap some shots!

t_ch: 纯狱风？
t_en: Prisoncore?

t_ch: 呃…好像不是想象中的那种「雅韵」。
t_en: Err... Doesn't look like the "stately" I imagined.

t_ch: 与时俱进不是坏事。
t_en: It's not a bad thing to stay informed on the times.

t_ch: 有些过于现代了…
t_en: This is a little too modern...

t_ch: 好古怪的镜头，到现在都摸不清它的作用到底是什么……
t_en: What a strange lens. I can't figure out exactly what its use is...

t_ch: 不管啦。这张照片不如就叫「岁阳蹦迪」吧？
t_en: Whatever. How about calling this photo "Heliobi in Rave"?

t_ch: 就叫「岁阳蹦迪」吧。
t_en: Let's call it "Heliobi in Rave."

t_ch: 岁阳的空闲生活，还真是丰富呀。
t_en: A heliobus' idyllic life sure is fulfilling.

t_ch: 不如叫…「岁阳雅集」？
t_en: How about... "Heliobi Literati"?

t_ch: 还是帮挺有文化的岁阳呢。
t_en: They sure are a cultured bunch of heliobi.

t_ch: 不如叫…「岁阳阴乐节」？
t_en: How about... "Heliobi Spooktacular Music Fest"?

t_ch: 好像有些阴间了…不过，这儿本来就和阴间差不离。
t_en: Too creepy... Though they don't stray far from the supernatural theme to begin with.

t_ch: 话说回来，为什么岁阳会出现在幽囚狱呢？
t_en: Speaking of which, why would heliobi appear in the Shackling Prison?

t_ch: 黑、黑漆漆的…我们真的还要继续往前吗……
t_en: I—It's so d—dark... Are we really going to keep going...

t_ch: 远处悉悉索索的声音逐渐靠近。来人看到了你们，明显长松一口气。
t_en: Distant rustling sounds gradually creep closer. Upon seeing you, the person sighs a visible relief.

t_ch: 各位，还、还好遇见的是你们……
t_en: G—Good thing it was you guys I ran into...

t_ch: 唉，练了这么久胆子，还是要找人帮忙，实在丢人。
t_en: *sigh* You've been training your guts for so long, and you're still looking for help. Pathetic.

t_ch: 不过是跑了群爱舞文弄墨的岁阳，要是老子出手，手拿把掐，一个都跑不了！
t_en: It's just a bunch of escaped heliobi that like flaunting their literary flair. I'd have them all rounded up with no effort if I stepped in!
Wehhh...

t_ch: 正好我出门忘带模特了…
t_en: Good thing you showed up. I forgot to bring a model with me...

t_ch: 练胆之前，先拍张照吧？
t_en: Before training your guts, how about a photo?

t_ch: 要拍我？可以是可以…不过，在这里拍吗？
t_en: A photo of me? I mean, sure... but, right here?

t_ch: 藿藿在镜头里会变成什么样，我也有点好奇呢。
t_en: I'm also a bit curious what Huohuo will look like through the lens.

t_ch: 拍写真有助于提高胆量。
t_en: Taking portrait shots helps boost your courage.

t_ch: 不过，我有种不祥的预感。要是镜头把藿藿变成步离战狂什么的，可就糟糕了……
t_en: But I've got a bad feeling about this. If the lens turns Huohuo into some battle-lusting borisin, it'd be bad...

t_ch: 试试才知道！
t_en: We'll only know if we try!

t_ch: 这么一说，更想试试了…
t_en: I'm even more eager to try it now...

t_ch: 你用安装了「镜头万花筒」的相机对准了藿藿。
t_en: You aim the camera attached with the Camereidoscope at Huohuo.

t_ch: 藿藿，看镜头！
t_en: Huohuo, look at the camera!

t_ch: 看到闪光灯居然都打哆嗦，真是要把本大爷笑得魂体破散了。
t_en: It's just the flash, stop quivering. I'm gonna laugh so hard that my spirit is gonna stop holding its shape.

t_ch: 怎么，吓得说不出话了？
t_en: What, so scared you're tongue-tied?

t_ch: 等等，尾巴大爷…藿藿好像有点奇怪……
t_en: Hang on, Mr. Tail... Something strange is going on with Huohuo...

t_ch: 哇呀呀呀——我…我…我再也忍不了啦！
t_en: Waahhhh I... I... I can't take this anymore!

t_ch: 明明是借住，还总是一副趾高气扬的样子——作为十王司的判官，判你好吃懒做、冷嘲热讽、指指点点罪！
t_en: I'm just lending you a place to live, yet you're always acting so high and mighty! As a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, I find you guilty of the crimes of sloth, mockery, and finger-pointing!

t_ch: 数罪并罚，立即执行！
t_en: With multiple crimes as witness, the sentencing commences now!

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 还有你们——敢擅自越狱，也统统立即执行！哇呀呀呀呀——
t_en: And you lot — trespassing in the prison, you will all be sentenced! Waahhh!!!

t_ch: 藿藿打断了岁阳们的「雅集」，追着它们跑远了。
t_en: Huohuo interrupts the heliobi's literary gathering, chasing them into the distance.

t_ch: 这下闯祸了！这个镜头到底是干什么的啊！
t_en: We've done it now! What the heck does this lens do!

t_ch: 呵，连我都敢骂，总算是长点儿出息了。
t_en: Heh, she was even brave enough to berate me. At least she's grown some guts.

t_ch: 感觉藿藿的样子有些奇怪…
t_en: I think Huohuo's looking a little strange...

t_ch: 还是快追上去吧！
t_en: We'd better catch up!

t_ch: 居然让藿藿完全变了个人似的，怎么拍我就没有这个效果？
t_en: I can't believe Huohuo has become a completely different person. How come I don't get this effect when you photograph me?

t_ch: 看来你的效果抵抗比较高。
t_en: It seems that your Effect RES is higher.

t_ch: 这就是无名客的身体素质！
t_en: That's the physique of the Nameless!

t_ch: 你们从集装箱上救下藿藿，回到了地面。
t_en: You all rescue Huohuo from the top of the container and return to the surface.

t_ch: 尾巴大爷，刚刚我也不知怎么回事…突然就……
t_en: Mr. Tail, I don't know what happened just now... I suddenly...

t_ch: 嘁，还以为你开窍了，居然只是被一个小玩意儿开涮了，还是回去再练练吧。
t_en: Tch, I thought you finally came to your senses, but it was just some gimmick that caused this. You'd better go back and train some more.

t_ch: 不过，这物事的确邪乎…本大爷在它身上感到了能惑乱人心的邪祟气息，还是小心看管为好。
t_en: But this thing's definitely sinister... I felt an evil aura from it that can confuse people's minds. You guys had better be careful.

t_ch: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，身为十王司判官，我绝不能放任邪祟祸害人间……
t_en: Sorry, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, as a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, I can't allow this evil to roam the realm...

t_ch: 小丫头竟然学会摆谱了，看来这一趟还真学到了点东西呢。
t_en: This little scamp has actually learned to put on airs. At least this wasn't a wasted trip.

t_ch: 我倒没有意见啦。{NICKNAME}，你呢？
t_en: I've no objections. What about you, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 立即执行！
t_en: The sentencing commences now!

t_ch: 多、多谢你！
t_en: Th—Thank you!

t_ch: 有没有什么补偿？
t_en: Any compensation involved?

t_ch: 这类民间收缴，十王司没有规定如何补偿…不介意的话，请收下这瓶「热浮羊奶」吧。
t_en: The Ten-Lords Commission does not have any compensation policies for items confiscated from citizenry... If you don't mind, you can take this bottle of steamed puffergoat milk.

t_ch: 可别怪本大爷没提醒你，又找理由不喝浮羊奶，会长不高的。
t_en: I don't need to remind you that you won't grow taller if you keep finding excuses to avoid drinking puffergoat milk.

t_ch: 我本来就不会再长高了……
t_en: I'm not going to grow taller in the first place...

t_ch: 藿藿郑重地将「镜头万花筒」收进锦囊，牢牢扎紧袋口。
t_en: Huohuo solemnly places the Camereidoscope in her pouch and ties it up tight.

t_ch: 该上传照片啦。藿藿，来给照片起个名字吧？
t_en: Time to upload the photo. Huohuo, why don't you give it a name?

t_ch: 咦，我来取吗？不如叫…「请勿登高」吧？这种不吉利的照片，要不还是删掉吧……
t_en: Huh, you're letting me name it? How about... "Please Do Not Climb"? Why not delete such an ominous photo instead...

t_ch: 依本大爷看，叫「小小判官大破岁阳」好些。
t_en: You know what I think? "Tiny Judge and Big Bad Heliobi" sounds much better.

t_ch: 就叫「请勿登高」吧。
t_en: "Please Do Not Climb" it is.

t_ch: 就叫「小小判官大破岁阳」吧。
t_en: "Tiny Judge and Big Bad Heliobi" it is then.

t_ch: 不如叫「判官岁阳一家亲」吧。
t_en: How about "Judge-Heliobus Collab"?

t_ch: 这么一来，今天的课题就完成啦。总感觉今天好漫长——藿藿，尾巴大爷，给你们添麻烦啦~
t_en: With that, today's task is complete. What a long day... Huohuo, Mr. Tail, sorry for the trouble!

t_ch: 嘿嘿…三月七小姐不必客气，等我收了这些岁阳，也就能回去交差了。
t_en: Hee-hee... Don't mention it, Miss March 7th. I'll be able to return to the Commission when I subdue these heliobi.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}不必担心，等我收了这些岁阳，也就能回去交差了。
t_en: Don't worry, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I'll be able to return to the Commission when I subdue these heliobi.

t_ch: 一手妙音，难得难得。
t_en: An exquisite sound, truly remarkable.

t_ch: 发之胸臆，心游物外……
t_en: Right from the chest, heart wandering beyond...

t_ch: 此等境界，妙哉妙哉。
t_en: Such heights, marvelous indeed.

t_ch: 噫！此生再无憾矣。
t_en: Aye! No more regrets in this life.

t_ch: （尖叫）（扭曲）（阴暗爬行）
t_en: (Screeching) (Twisting) (Creeping)

t_ch: 蹦到宇宙毁灭！！！
t_en: Dance till the universe is destroyed!!!

t_ch: 安可！安可！安可！
t_en: Encore! Encore! Encore!

t_ch: 感应到了，就在前边不远的地方！
t_en: I can feel it. It's not far ahead!

t_ch: 本大爷先行一步了，你们速速跟上！
t_en: I'll take the front. You guys keep up!

t_ch: 唔，就在前边的货箱上！
t_en: Hmm, on that crate in front of us!

t_ch: 救、救命……
t_en: H—Help me...

t_ch: 救、救命……
t_en: H—Help me...

t_ch: 哼…小小岁阳，奉我敕令！
t_en: Hmph... Puny heliobus, heed my command!

t_ch: 燃起来了！
t_en: Fired up!

t_ch: 舞！舞！舞！
t_en: Dance! Dance! Dance!

t_ch: 奉旨蹦迪！
t_en: Raving is our mandate!

t_ch: …也就是说，你们是工造司专门为演武仪典设计的「机巧鸟SP」？
t_en: ...Which also means, you guys are the Cycrane SPs specifically designed by the Artisanship Commission for the Wardance?

t_ch: 那可不嘛！就为了把弟兄们按时造出来，大工正都累倒了三个呢。
t_en: Obviously! Three Master Artisans fainted from fatigue just to build my buddies in time.

t_ch: 这么说来…普通机巧鸟做不到的，对你们来说也一定轻易如反掌吧？
t_en: That means... you guys can do what normal cycranes can't do with ease?

t_ch: 稳定性、续航、集群协作能力，那叫一个云泥之别。您要是不信，咱给您列个阵瞧瞧。
t_en: Stability, endurance, cluster coordination capability — the difference is heaven and earth. Don't believe me? Allow us to show you a formation.

t_ch: 那可太感谢啦——{NICKNAME}，你想看什么阵？
t_en: Much appreciated then! {NICKNAME}, what formation do you want to see?

t_ch: 画个圈——圆形阵。
t_en: Draw a circle. A circle formation.

t_ch: 比个心——心形阵。
t_en: Make a heart. A heart formation.

t_ch: 占个卜——穷观阵。
t_en: Make a divination. The Matrix of Prescience.

t_ch: 这…您还是饶了我吧。不然随意开阵，太卜司可就饶不得我了。
t_en: Err... How about something else? The Divination Commission will put me out of commission if we casually initiate that formation.

t_ch: 明白了，您就瞧好吧！
t_en: Got it. Watch closely!

t_ch: 机巧鸟集合伙伴，邀你们一同来到了演武台……
t_en: The cycrane gathers its companions and invites you to the stage...

t_ch: 「列阵」
t_en: Form up!

t_ch: 得令！您就瞧好吧！
t_en: Command received! Watch closely!

t_ch: 栖在地上的机巧鸟振翅飞起，喊着友情梦想什么的，合力排成了你要求的阵列……
t_en: The cycranes roosted on the ground flap their wings, shouting words of friendship and dreams, and together create the formation you requested...

t_ch: 好POSE！快，{NICKNAME}，抓住机会拍一张！
t_en: Nice pose! Quick, {NICKNAME}, capture this moment!

t_ch: 得令！
t_en: Command received!

t_ch: 三月太狡猾了！
t_en: You're such a trickster, March!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，是它们太热情了。快拍快拍，别辜负了它们的一片好意。
t_en: Heehee, they were just too enthusiastic. Hurry up and take the shot. Don't squander their efforts.

t_ch: 呼哧——呼哧——演武仪典之后，好久没这么劳累过了。
t_en: Huff... Huff... I haven't been so tired out since the Wardance.

t_ch: 嘿，你们这照片，拍得还真有两下子。不如就叫「蓝天守望者」吧。
t_en: Hey, this photo isn't bad at all. Why not name it "Guardian of the Azure Sky"?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你觉得呢？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, what'd you think?

t_ch: 就叫「蓝天守望者」吧！
t_en: "Guardian of the Azure Sky" it is then!

t_ch: 叫「机动战士机巧鸟」！
t_en: Name it "Mobile Suit Cycrane"!

t_ch: 好…好酷的名字！我喜欢！
t_en: Wh... What a cool name! I like it!

t_ch: 叫「机巧鸟苍穹战线」！
t_en: Name it "Firmament Frontline: Cycrane"!

t_ch: 好…好酷的名字！我喜欢！
t_en: Wh... What a cool name! I like it!

t_ch: 好嘞！上传完成，咱们可以去拍下一张照片啦。
t_en: All right! Upload complete! We can move on to the next photo.

t_ch: 我的剑前些日子被云璃带走修炼了，刚刚在竞锋舰上感应到了它的气息。咱们去找找看吧，没准能拍下朱明剑客修炼的宝贵画面呢~
t_en: Yunli borrowed my sword to do some training some days ago. I just felt its presence on the Skysplitter. Let's go find it. Maybe we can capture some precious scenes of the Zhuming swordmaster at practice!

t_ch: 我感觉到…剑在这个方向！
t_en: I sense that... the sword is this way!

t_ch: 这也能感应到吗？
t_en: You can actually sense it?

t_ch: 哼哼，这就是人剑合一的境界！
t_en: Heh-heh, this is the state of unity between owner and sword!

t_ch: 越来越有主张了呢！
t_en: You're getting more assertive!

t_ch: 当然，本姑娘的聪明才智可是一等一的！
t_en: Of course, my acumen is second to none!

t_ch: 我感觉到…在另外一个方向！
t_en: I sense that... it's in the other direction!

t_ch: 才不是！本姑娘的剑我最清楚，跟我来！
t_en: No, it's not! I'm in perfect sync with my own sword. Follow me!

t_ch: 彦卿师傅，你怎么也在这儿？
t_en: Master Yanqing, what're you doing here?

t_ch: 云璃姑娘之前冠冕堂皇地声称要带我的剑「修炼」，如今一看，却是跑来偷懒。
t_en: Miss Yunli grandly claimed that she was going to borrow my sword for "training," but it's quite obvious that she's come here to goof off.

t_ch: 看来我的剑也在那儿巴巴地跟着呢……
t_en: Looks like my sword is also shambling along over there...

t_ch: 听闻二位摄影技巧了得，彦卿有一事相求——请将这番<color=#dbc291ff>证据</color>拍下，免得到时她又抵赖。
t_en: I've heard that you two have superb photography skills, so I've a favor to ask — please take a picture of this <color=#dbc291ff>as evidence</color>, so that she can't deny it again.

t_ch: 云璃问清了事情原委……
t_en: Yunli finds out what's going on...

t_ch: 唔嗯，尝身的技炒拙劣，我的枣片拍得到不戳。
t_en: Mmmf, oor hidfing skillf ihf therrible, but my photo'f preffy deshent.

t_ch: …要不咱先咽下去再说？
t_en: ...How about swallowing before we talk?

t_ch: 云璃姑娘，有了这幅「窃剑遛弯贪嘴图」，偷懒一事铁证如山，这你如何交代？
t_en: Miss Yunli, this casually-strolling-with-stolen-swords-while-mouth-full picture is quite the mountain of evidence stacked against your favor. How will you explain this?

t_ch: 哼，练剑可不止一昧苦修，得带它们多见些风光事物，才能蕴养灵性。
t_en: Hmph, sword practice isn't just about training hard. You have to take them to see the sights and experience life — that's how you train their spirits.

t_ch: 两位师傅不要吵啦——这张照片，不如叫做「携剑游学赏风图」好了！
t_en: Don't fight, masters — why not call this photo "Swordbearer's Sightseeing on Study Tour"?

t_ch: 也带我的球棒练练。
t_en: Train my bat too.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}老师，莫要和云璃姑娘一同胡闹！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, please do not join in Miss Yunli's tomfoolery!

t_ch: 真是端水大师！
t_en: You sure are unbiased!

t_ch: 哼哼，本姑娘为人处世本来就八面玲珑，滴水不漏！
t_en: Heh-heh, I've always had a knack for squashing beef without fail!

t_ch: 快看，我们已经拍完了整整七天的课题了。回头看看这些天的作品，真是不容易！
t_en: Look, look, we've completed the tasks for the whole week. Looking back at what we photographed, these few days sure have been tough!

t_ch: 要是没在那「摄影仪典」上拔个头筹回来，我可不轻饶你哦。
t_en: If you don't get top prize in that photograph ceremony, I won't let you off easy.

t_ch: 哎呀，修身怡情的赛事，倒也不必那么功利，但也愿你能名列前茅。
t_en: Oh. There's no need to be so practical in a competition that can be enjoyed and cultivates the heart. But I do hope you'll be ranked at the top too.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，多谢两位师傅！奖项会在闭幕式上公布，如果有好消息，一定第一时间向你们报喜~
t_en: Hee-hee, thank you! The awards will be announced at the closing ceremony. You'll be the first to know if I have good news!

t_ch: 所以比起那冤诬的称呼，这相片还是叫「剑锋入世再砺图」更恰当。
t_en: Which is why, better than those accusatory titles, this photo should be more appropriately called "Worldly Sword Travels for Tempering."

t_ch: 虽然说着重在参与，但想到有可能拿奖，还是紧张得心砰砰直跳呢。
t_en: I know I said participation is important, but when I think that I might win, my heart's pounding super hard.

t_ch: 希望自己的努力得到认可是人之常情，我在切磋前也常心有忐忑。
t_en: It's only natural to hope that your hard work will be acknowledged. My mood is usually also a mess before a duel.

t_ch: 凭着三月的灵心慧性，拿奖一定是手到拈来啦。
t_en: March's smart and talented. She's a shoo-in for a prize.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，咱们颁奖典礼见~
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I'll see you at the award ceremony!

t_ch: 三月七的直觉把你们带到了小吃摊附近……
t_en: March 7th's instinct brings you two to a nearby food stall...

t_ch: 那种感觉越来越近了…在这边！
t_en: That feeling... It's getting closer... Over here!

t_ch: 唔！你们——
t_en: Uh! You guys—

t_ch: （嚼嚼嚼）
t_en: (Nom nom nom)

t_ch: 怎么在这儿！
t_en: What are you doing here!?

t_ch: （嚼嚼嚼）
t_en: (Nom nom nom)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来啦！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're here!

t_ch: 闭幕式到哪个环节了？
t_en: Where's the closing ceremony up to?

t_ch: 芮克先生说完了闭幕词，正在颁发奖项呢！
t_en: Mr. Reca just finished his closing speech. They're giving out the awards now!

t_ch: 竟然还换上了礼服？
t_en: You really got all dressed up?

t_ch: 这种重大场合，当然要严肃对待！再说了，好不容易置办的礼服，只穿一次多可惜。
t_en: This is an important event, so I've got to take it seriously! And I went through so much trouble to buy this dress. It'd be a waste if I only wore it once.

t_ch: 嘘，最后一批奖项就要公布了！
t_en: Shh, they're about to announce the last batch of awards!

t_ch: 接下来，就是本届摄影展的最后一个奖项——「最佳新人奖」。
t_en: Next up is the final award of this photography exhibition — the Best New Artist award.

t_ch: 请允许我宣布获奖者的名字：来自星穹列车的无名客，{TEXTJOIN#191}小姐！
t_en: Allow me to declare the name of our winner: The Nameless from the Astral Express, Miss {TEXTJOIN#191}!

t_ch: 诶诶诶——呜哇呜哇呜哇！！！
t_en: Heyheyheyyyyy! Wowowow!

t_ch: 激动得说不出话了…
t_en: She's totally tongue-tied...

t_ch: 深呼吸，注意表情管理！
t_en: Deep breaths. Watch your expressions!

t_ch: 如果说电影的奥妙是用动态的镜头捕获流动的时空，摄影则是以静态的镜头凝固动人的瞬间。
t_en: If the magic of movies is using a moving lens to capture the flow of space and time, then photography is using a stationary lens to freeze moments of captivation.

t_ch: 而{TEXTJOIN#191}小姐用组照对比的形式，将时间的维度也囊括于作品之中，可谓别出心裁。
t_en: And Miss {TEXTJOIN#191} used the contrast in her photographs to embody the dimensions of time in her work — breathtakingly unique.

t_ch: 真正优秀的拍摄者致力于投身于作品中，而所有照片，都不过是拍下了自己。
t_en: A truly exceptional photographer immerses themselves fully in a shot — all photos are but a reflection of yourself.

t_ch: 即便是一只偶然入镜的蝴蝶，也应当不断扇动翅膀，扰乱一副画面，一座城市，一颗星球，直到……
t_en: Even a butterfly that strays into frame should continuously beat its wings, disrupting a painting, a city, and a planet, till...

t_ch: 什么什么？
t_en: What? Till what?

t_ch: 留下最好的照片。
t_en: ...Till the best photograph is left behind.

t_ch: 热烈的掌声和欢呼声里，三月七接过了「最佳新人奖」的奖杯。
t_en: Amidst raucous applause and cheers, March 7th accepts the "Best New Artist" trophy.

t_ch: 「趣味滤镜奖」——甜甜软糖小姐；「最大画幅奖」——一口苏乐达先生。
t_en: "Fun Filter Award" — Miss Sweet Gummy Candy. "Largest Frame Award" — Mr. A Sip of SoulGlad.

t_ch: 「最速快门奖」的得主则是——无冕之王子！平均每张成片连拍近百张，不漏过任何决定性的瞬间。请代我向您的快门帘问好。
t_en: The winner of the "Fastest Shutter Award" goes to... Crownless Prince! With an average of nearly <unbreak>100</unbreak> consecutive shots for each finished picture, no decisive moment was overlooked. Please extend my regards to your camera shutter.

t_ch: 呜…还是没有我，这回不会白跑一趟吧！
t_en: Oh... they still didn't call my name. Please don't tell me this is a wasted trip!

t_ch: 这么一来，这次摄影展就告一段落啦。
t_en: And with that, this photography exhibition comes to a close.

t_ch: 这七天里，我们拍了匹诺康尼的街道和舞台，还拿到花火的镜头，回仙舟拍了些千奇百怪的照片…一转眼冷清下来，还真有点不适应。
t_en: In these seven days, we photographed Penacony's streets and stage, then we got Sparkle's lens and returned to the Xianzhou to take all sorts of bizarre photos... Now that I've calmed down, I really do feel a bit out of sorts.

t_ch: 旅途还在继续…
t_en: The voyage continues...

t_ch: 摄影修行也不会停止！
t_en: The road to becoming a master photographer never ends, either!

t_ch: 嗯！{NICKNAME}，你说得没错！
t_en: Yeah! You're totally right, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 不止照片记下的那一瞬间，照片和照片之间，也发生了许多事情…照片一叠叠变厚，失去记忆的那段日子，好像在生命里也显得越来越短了呢……
t_en: It's not just the instant that the photos captured, but the many things that happened between photos... As the photos stack up, the portion of my life when I had no memories seems to get smaller and smaller...

t_ch: 咳咳，列车马上就要启程了——在下一站，我们也要一起留下更多更好的照片哦！
t_en: Ahem, the Express is about to depart! Next stop, we're gonna keep snapping even more, even better photographs!

t_ch: 合影也给你一份吧。{NICKNAME}，你可要好好珍藏哦！
t_en: Here's a copy of the group photo, {NICKNAME}. You'd better not lose it!

t_ch: 收下。
t_en: We'll take it.

t_ch: 还是得我们正牌出马！
t_en: It seems like we need to step in!

t_ch: 哼哼，没错，让大家看看谁才是真正的「星穹列车」！
t_en: You're right! We gotta show them who is the real Astral Express!

t_ch: 对啦，别忘了把丹恒也叫上。
t_en: Yes. Don't forget to get Dan Heng here too.

t_ch: 你们邀请来丹恒，向他说明了情况……
t_en: You and the others invite Dan Heng and explain the situation to him...

t_ch: 呃…所以说，我们三个都得上场吗？我可以帮你们拍照。
t_en: Eh... So, must all three of us be in it? I can help to take pictures.

t_ch: 来都来了，就别打退堂鼓啦。
t_en: Since you're already here, no reason for you to back out now.

t_ch: 蕉——蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Na—Nanana!

t_ch: 睡蕉小猴攀爬在摩天大楼之上，仿佛成了都市丛林中的霸主。
t_en: The Slumbernana Monkey climbs on top of a skyscraper as if it has become the overlord in the urban jungle.

t_ch: 可惜没有佳人在侧，更没有飞机可以击落，因此稍显落寞。
t_en: Unfortunately, it has neither a beauty by its side nor airplanes to shoot down, making it seem a bit lonely.

t_ch: （给大厦上的睡蕉小猴拍张照吧……）
t_en: (Take a photo of the Slumbernana Monkey on the skyscraper...)

t_ch: （来得有些迟了…颁奖典礼进行到哪一步了？）
t_en: (I'm late... What's going on with the award ceremony right now?)

t_ch: （颁奖典礼终于结束了…去找三月七聊聊吧。）
t_en: (The award ceremony is finally over... Let's go talk to March 7th.)

t_ch: 呼——颁奖典礼结束啦。刚才居然还有人找我签名，紧张得我差点把笔写劈叉了！
t_en: Phewwww, the ceremony is over! Someone even asked for my autograph just now. I was so nervous I almost broke the pen in half!

t_ch: 恭喜获奖！
t_en: Congrats on winning!

t_ch: 没有你这位「最佳摄影助理」帮忙，我肯定拿不了奖！
t_en: Without the help of my Best Photography Assistant, I never would've won!

t_ch: 都是我这摄影助理的功劳！
t_en: It's all thanks to my awesome assistant skills!

t_ch: 那当然，应该给你颁发一个「最佳摄影助理奖」！
t_en: Obviously! They should give you a "Best Photography Assistant award"!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我还想拍些照片留念，咱们邀请一些朋友来拍合影吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I still want to take some shots for memories. How about we invite a few friends for a group photo?

t_ch: 邀请星核猎手！
t_en: Invite the Stellaron Hunters!

t_ch: 你想起了卡芙卡、刃、银狼和流萤，随即拨通了通讯…听筒里传来此起彼伏的枪声和爆炸声。
t_en: You recall Kafka, Blade, Silver Wolf, and Firefly, and you give them a call... But all you can hear from the earpiece is a cascading cacophony of gunfire and explosions.

t_ch: 呃…暂时还是不要打扰他们了吧？
t_en: Err... Probably not the best time to interrupt them?

t_ch: 邀请公司的朋友们！
t_en: Invite your friends from the IPC!

t_ch: 你想起了托帕、砂金和翡翠，随即拨通了通讯…智械助手冰冷的声音礼貌地提醒你，对方「正在会议中」。
t_en: You recall Topaz, Aventurine, and Jade, and you give them a ring... An Intellitron assistant's emotionless robotic voice politely reminds you that they are "in a meeting."

t_ch: 呃…暂时还是不要打扰他们了吧？
t_en: Err... Probably not the best time to interrupt them?

t_ch: 邀请协助摄影的朋友们！
t_en: Invite those who helped with the photos!

t_ch: 你想起了参展期间帮忙完成摄影作品的朋友们…正巧，这会儿不少人都有空。
t_en: You recall all your friends who helped complete your photography during the exhibition... Coincidentally, many of them are free right now.

t_ch: 太好啦，{NICKNAME}，快邀请大家过来吧！
t_en: Fantastic! {NICKNAME}, hurry up and invite everyone!

t_ch: 邀请列车组的家人们！
t_en: Invite the Express family!

t_ch: 这种历史性的时刻，「星穹列车一家人」怎么能错过？正巧，这会儿他们都有空。
t_en: How could we let the Astral Express family miss out on such a momentous occasion? Coincidentally, they're all free right now.

t_ch: 太好啦，{NICKNAME}，快邀请大家过来吧！
t_en: Fantastic! {NICKNAME}, hurry up and invite everyone!

t_ch: 看来这次展览，的确让你有所长进。
t_en: Looks like you've improved much in this exhibition.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，谢谢大家！咱们来拍合影吧~
t_en: Hee-hee, thank you everyone! Let's take a group photo!

t_ch: 大家预备——
t_en: Ready, everyone?

t_ch: 大家在你和三月七的指导下，站在了合适的位置。
t_en: Instructed by you and March 7th, everyone stands in their appropriate spots.

t_ch: 就让这张合影，成为摄影展的压轴之作吧！
t_en: We'll have this group photo be the grand finale for this exhibition!

t_ch: 大家一起说——
t_en: Everyone say...

t_ch: ——茄子！
t_en: ...Cheese!

t_ch: 捕捉到了每个人的笑容……
t_en: Everyone's smiles are captured...

t_ch: 三月七小姐，藿藿就知道，你的照片一定能受大家喜欢！
t_en: Miss March 7th, I knew from the start that your photo would be a smash hit!

t_ch: 本大爷的指导功不可没啊。
t_en: Not without credit to my excellent instructions.

t_ch: 恭喜你啦，小三月，可真给我们列车挣了不少脸面呢。
t_en: Congrats, March, you really garnered plenty of recognition for the Express.

t_ch: 想必在很久之后再回看这些照片，会颇有感慨吧。
t_en: The next time you see these photos again, they'll probably bring back some great memories.

t_ch: 下一次，也可以找我来当「摄影助理」。另外，帕姆让我转告：
t_en: You can also get me to be your photography assistant next time. Also, Pom-Pom has a message for you:

t_ch: 「等你回来，我会把奖杯放在最显眼的地方的帕！」
t_en: "When you're back, I'll place the trophy in the most conspicuous spot, pom!"

t_ch: 嘿嘿，谢谢大家！咱们来拍合影吧~
t_en: Hee-hee, thank you everyone! Let's take a group photo!

t_ch: 大家预备——
t_en: Ready, everyone?

t_ch: 大家在你和三月七的指导下，站在了合适的位置。
t_en: Instructed by you and March 7th, everyone stands in their appropriate spots.

t_ch: 就让这张合影，成为摄影展的压轴之作吧~
t_en: We'll have this group photo be the grand finale for this exhibition~

t_ch: 大家一起说——
t_en: Everyone say...

t_ch: ——茄子！
t_en: ...Cheese!

t_ch: 捕捉到了每个人的笑容……
t_en: Everyone's smiles are captured...

t_ch: 片刻后，参展期间偶遇的朋友们来到了现场。
t_en: Moments later, the friends from the exhibition arrive.

t_ch: 片刻后，列车组的大家来到了现场。
t_en: Moments later, the Express crew arrives.

t_ch: 你和三月七又邀请了其他朋友合影留念。
t_en: You and March 7th have also invited other friends for a group photo.

t_ch: 一段时间之后……
t_en: Sometime later...

t_ch: 那么，你的结论是？
t_en: So then, what is your conclusion?

t_ch: 正如我们最初设想的那样，星神和凡人的方程式，仅靠差分宇宙还不足以解答如此庞大的课题。
t_en: It is just as we initially posited: It is insufficient to solely rely on the Divergent Universe to solve a problem as vast as the equation of Aeons and mortals.

t_ch: 但就个人而言，我从「人间喜剧」的研究中收获颇丰。
t_en: But personally speaking, I have gained a bountiful harvest from the Human Comedy's research.

t_ch: 已逝去的，仍活着的和…可能会诞生的命途行者，不同概率的花朵在同一根枝条上绽放，足以成为灵感回路中的珍藏。
t_en: Pathstriders who have passed away, who are still alive... and who may be born in the future. Flowers of different probabilities blooming on the same branch are enough to become treasures in the Inspiration Circuit.

t_ch: 两位，好久不见。
t_en: It's been a long time.

t_ch: 上次见面还是上次。
t_en: The last time we met was the last time.

t_ch: 我就是差分宇宙之王！
t_en: I am the king of the Divergent Universe!

t_ch: 我在听，你继续说。
t_en: I'm listening. Please continue.

t_ch: 巧合：正如灵感的落花在触地前与现实相遇。{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我和拉帝奥先生正要谈论到你的事情。
t_en: Coincidence: Just as the falling flowers of inspiration touch the ground before encountering reality. {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, Mr. Ratio and I were just about to talk about you.

t_ch: 严格说来，单一课题的终止和你关系不大。结题之后，俱乐部的几位也总会给你找新的事情做。
t_en: Strictly speaking, the conclusion of a singular research topic would not have much to do with you. The members of the Society will surely give you something new to do after the wrap-up.

t_ch: 总结：在完成最后的更新迭代后，<color=#dbc291ff>「人间喜剧」的课题也将就此结束。</color>
t_en: Conclusion: After completing the final iterative update, <color=#dbc291ff>the research project "The Human Comedy" will come to an end.</color>

t_ch: 结束？那我测什么？
t_en: End? What do I test then?

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆你别走！
t_en: Don't go, Screwllum!

t_ch: 我以后早睡早起来测试！
t_en: I will wake up earlier to do testing in future!

t_ch: 请不必为这段合作关系的终结而悲伤，对于<color=#dbc291ff>差分宇宙的下一个课题</color>，你的帮助仍是不可或缺的。
t_en: Please do not be saddened by the end of this collaboration. Your assistance will still be essential for the <color=#dbc291ff>next Divergent Universe research project</color>.

t_ch: 而「人间喜剧」最后的迭代，也需要你来提供更多的变量，为它画上完美的休止符。
t_en: And The Human Comedy's final iteration also requires your provision of even more variables, to end it with a perfect rest.

t_ch: 至于那些危险的误差值，我想，拉帝奥先生知道该如何处理。
t_en: As for those dangerous discrepancies, I think Mr. Ratio knows how to manage them.

t_ch: 处理误差，是公司和博识学会的事情，我只负责把数据转交他们。
t_en: Handling discrepancies is the IPC and the Intelligentsia Guild's business. I'm just here to deliver the data to them.

t_ch: 当然，以我的了解，大部分人只会把头埋进沙里，直到情况恶化到无法解决。
t_en: Of course, my understanding tells me that many will only bury their heads in sand, till the matter spirals into an insurmountable state.

t_ch: 相比之下，{NICKNAME}，尽管同样毫无行为逻辑，怠于思考，但愿意从失败中汲取教训这点，你就超过了<unbreak>90</unbreak>％的学者。
t_en: In contrast, {NICKNAME}, while you are equally lacking in behavioral logic and indolent in thought, you are still willing to learn from your failures. That makes you better than <unbreak>90%</unbreak> of scholars.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，感谢夸奖。
t_en: D'aww, you're such a flatterer.

t_ch: 我感觉你在埋汰我…
t_en: Feels like you're throwing mad shade...

t_ch: 怎么拐我身上了？
t_en: What's this got to do with me?

t_ch: 无论如何，既然命途方程式预测出了复数个可能诞生的灾厄，在庸人们死于安乐前，总要有人扮演厄兆先锋的角色。
t_en: Regardless, since the Paths Equation had forecasted multiple possible catastrophes, someone must play the part of the Omen Vanguards before the Mundanites die in their serenity.

t_ch: 他们会重视的。逻辑：当我们三人的名字在同一份实验报告上出现时，他们不得不重视。
t_en: They will take this seriously. Logic: When our three names appear on the same experimental report, they will have no choice but to pay attention.

t_ch: 无论是<color=#dbc291ff>「人间喜剧」最后的迭代</color>，还是<color=#dbc291ff>未来的全新课题</color>，你的帮助都不可或缺。
t_en: Be it <color=#dbc291ff>the Human Comedy's final iteration</color>, or <color=#dbc291ff>a whole new research project in the future</color>, your help will be invaluable.

t_ch: 既然命途方程式预测出了可能诞生的种种灾厄，在庸人们死于安乐前，总要有人扮演厄兆先锋的角色。
t_en: Since the Paths Equation had forecasted multiple possible catastrophes, someone must play the part of the Omen Vanguards before the Mundanites die in their serenity.

t_ch: 你需要帮助吗？
t_en: Do you need help?

t_ch: （怎么有个从未见过的孩子在这里……）
t_en: (Why is there a child that I've never seen before here...)

t_ch: （听说…她并没有搭理任何向她伸出援手的居民，是害怕陌生人吗？）
t_en: (I heard she ignored every resident who offered a helping hand... Is she afraid of strangers?)

t_ch: …晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
t_en: ...The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...

t_ch: 啊，好心的{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你终于来了！你能帮我找回乌拉尼娅的「眼睛」吗？
t_en: Ah, good-hearted {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, you're finally here! Can you help me find Urania's "eyes"?

t_ch: 乌拉尼娅的眼睛？是什么？
t_en: Urania's eyes? What's that?

t_ch: 你刚在嘟囔什么？
t_en: What're you muttering about?

t_ch: 好奇的{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，请不要在意。
t_en: Curious {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, please don't mind me.

t_ch: 乌拉尼娅的眼睛并非此刻目视你的这一双，乌拉尼娅的眼睛能看到更多——
t_en: Urania's eyes aren't the eyes looking at you right now. Urania's eyes can see more...

t_ch: 它是艾格勒赐下的圣卷，我们一族过去领受了它的恩典，要祖祖辈辈借助此物记录天空下的所见，作为晨昏之眼目光的延伸。
t_en: They are holy scrolls bestowed by Aquila. Our clan once received their grace, and we have been using this relic to record all that happens in the world for generations, as an extension of the Eye of Twilight's gaze.

t_ch: 此行，我被派来记录奥赫玛最近发生的事，没想到新的没写上，还把旧的给弄丢了。
t_en: On this journey, I have been dispatched to record the recent incidents at Okhema. Unfortunately, I didn't get to record in the new scroll, and even lost the old one.

t_ch: 乌拉尼娅在这儿人生地不熟，你可以帮帮我吗？如果找不到的话，乌拉尼娅是不被允许回家的。
t_en: I'm a stranger in this place... Can you help? If I can't find it, I won't be allowed to go home.

t_ch: 你有什么线索吗？
t_en: Do you have any clues?

t_ch: 走，我带你去儿童保护协会。
t_en: Come, I will escort you to the Child Protective Service.

t_ch: 呜呜呜…我就知道，你也打心底里忌讳与我同行，视我如厄运一般。
t_en: *sobbing* ...I knew it. Deep down, you're also unwilling to travel with me and see me as some walking misfortune.

t_ch: 大家都是这么说的，乌拉尼娅这种没爸没妈的孤儿，接触后会染上不幸……
t_en: Everyone thinks this way. An orphan like me without parents... only bad luck will follow if you stay around me...

t_ch: 对不起！
t_en: Sorry!

t_ch: 我亲自出马！
t_en: I'll do it myself!

t_ch: 没问题，加钱就行。
t_en: No problem at all. For an additional fee, though.

t_ch: 呜呜呜…看来他们说的都是真的……
t_en: *sniffles* Looks like they're telling the truth...

t_ch: 对不起！
t_en: Sorry!

t_ch: 我帮你！无任何隐藏费用！
t_en: I'll help you! No hidden fees involved!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我帮你标注几个可能有「眼睛」的地点——
t_en: Hee-hee, {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, I'll help you mark out some locations where the "Eyes" may be...

t_ch: 这些卷轴大概有一个你那么高。回收卷轴的时候你可能会听到一些声响，不过不用害怕，那都是属于过去的话语，并不危险。
t_en: These scrolls are probably about as tall as you. When you retrieve them, you may hear some sounds, but don't be scared — those are whispers of the past, and they're not dangerous at all.

t_ch: 我们出发吧！
t_en: Let's set off now!

t_ch: 你不一起去吗？
t_en: You're not coming with?

t_ch: 不是，你还挺会使唤人。
t_en: Well, who went and put you in charge?

t_ch: 你话还没问出口，眨眼间，眼前的孩子已消失在了人潮中……
t_en: You haven't even gotten a chance to ask your question when, in the blink of an eye, the child before you disappears into the crowd...

t_ch: （哎，这儿的小孩儿真没规矩——先看看她留下的线索吧。）
t_en: (Bah, children in these parts are so rude. Let's just take a look at the clue she left behind.)

t_ch: 他们说乌拉尼娅永远得不到他人的善意和爱，因为乌拉尼娅是个没爸没妈的孤儿……
t_en: They say I will never receive kindness and love from others, because I am an orphan with no parents...
